text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Arima Kinen just ahead, Inari One seems
more nervous than I've ever seen her. Despite her
anxiety, she's excited to turn the race into her
personal festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a soul meant to burn bright, she heads off
toward the track, ready to show everyone the
soul that'll give her festival its style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Super Creek, seeing the change in
Inari One, smile fearlessly, ready for the
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time for the biggest festival of the
Twinkle Series to begin! The curtains rise on the
fate-defining Arima Kinen!
